single_weapon.name: Single Weapon Proficiency
single_weapon.description: Choose one weapon. You suffer no penalty to attack rolls with that weapon.

weapon_focus.name: Weapon Focus
weapon_focus.description: +1 bonus to all attack rolls with one chosen weapon. Cannot combine with specialization (fighters get +2 damage instead).

weapon_group.name: Weapon Group
weapon_group.description: Proficiency in all weapons of a group. After 1 slot: -1 penalty with all group weapons. After 2 slots: no penalty.

weapon_specialization.name: Weapon Specialization
weapon_specialization.description: +1 attack bonus, +2 damage bonus with one proficient weapon. Attack rate increases (3/2 at levels 1-6, 2/1 at 7-12).

fighting_styles.name: Finesse Fighting
fighting_styles.description: Use your Ranged Attack Modifier (DEX) for melee attack bonuses. Limited to finesse weapons only. STR damage bonus still applies.

specialization.name: Finesse Specialization
specialization.description: Use DEX modifier for both attack AND damage. Initiative die reduced by 1 step.

fighting_styles.name: Great Weaponry
fighting_styles.description: Two-handed weapons used with greater ease. Each round choose: defensive (+1 parry bonus) or offensive (+2 damage).

specialization.name: Great Weaponry Specialization
specialization.description: Initiative reduced by one die type. Parry bonus +2, offensive damage +4. Requires two successful disarms to lose weapon.

fighting_styles.name: Single Weapon Style
fighting_styles.description: +1 AC vs one opponent. Free hand can attack or maneuver without staggering weapon attacks.

specialization.name: Single Weapon Specialization
specialization.description: +1 AC vs all forward/flanking opponents. Free hand grants +2 to any special maneuver.

fighting_styles.name: Two Weapon Style
fighting_styles.description: Extra off-hand attack each round (weapon must be one size smaller). Penalties: -2 primary, -4 off-hand.

specialization.name: Two Weapon Specialization
specialization.description: Penalties reduced to -2/-2. Can choose defensive (+1 AC, +1 defensive maneuvers) or offensive (+2 offensive maneuvers, -2 attacks). Can wield same-size weapons.

fighting_styles.name: Unarmed Combat
fighting_styles.description: Improved unarmed fighting: grapple penalty reduced to -2, increased attack rate (one step up), damage 1d4 (Medium), +AC bonus equal to half BTH.

specialization.name: Unarmed Specialization
specialization.description: No penalty for grapples. +2 attack bonus on all combat maneuvers while unarmed.

fighting_styles.name: Weapon and Shield
fighting_styles.description: Shield AC bonus +1. Defensive maneuvers with shield get +2 bonus.

specialization.name: Weapon and Shield Specialization
specialization.description: Extra shield attack each round (-2 penalty, 1d3 + half STR damage). Can forfeit for additional +1 shield AC instead.

maneuvers.name: Maneuver Training
maneuvers.description: +2 attack bonus for one specific combat maneuver (parry, disarm, etc. — not called shots).

maneuvers.name: Accuracy Training
maneuvers.description: Reduce called shot penalty by 2 for all called shots.

General.name: Acrobatics
General.desc: Physical nimbleness — tumbles, gymnastics, jumps and dives.

General.name: Appraising
General.desc: Gauge the value of gems, jewelry, art, and other collectibles.

General.name: Athletics
General.desc: Athleticism and hand-eye coordination — jumping, catching, throwing.

General.name: Climbing
General.desc: Scale trees, rocks, walls and other surfaces without special equipment.

General.name: Craft (choose trade)
General.desc: A craft or trade — blacksmithing, brewing, cooking, weaponsmithing, etc.

General.name: Diplomacy
General.desc: Social awareness and proper etiquette across different social situations.

General.name: Healing
General.desc: Treat wounds, diagnose illness, staunch blood flow, identify cause of death.

General.name: Know Language
General.desc: Read, write, and speak an additional language.

General.name: Local Lore
General.desc: Knowledge of a location's history, officials, nobility, and current events.

General.name: Mercantilism
General.desc: Trading practices, merchant negotiation, and economic knowledge.

General.name: Riding (Air-Based)
General.desc: Riding and aerial maneuvers with flying mounts.

General.name: Riding (Land-Based)
General.desc: Riding and combat maneuvers with land-based mounts.

General.name: Rope Use
General.desc: Knots, lashings, and all manner of rope work.

General.name: Swimming
General.desc: Swimming against currents, in open water, and in armor.

Academic.name: Astronomy
Academic.desc: Study of stars and celestial bodies; read celestial charts.

Academic.name: Dark Arts
Academic.desc: Knowledge of demonology, exorcism, and dark rituals.

Academic.name: Engineering
Academic.desc: Design and build structures, aqueducts, and siege weaponry.

Academic.name: Geography
Academic.desc: Knowledge of a region's terrain, environment, and inhabitants.

Academic.name: History, Ancient
Academic.desc: Knowledge of ancient cultures and historical events.

Academic.name: History, Local
Academic.desc: Knowledge of local history and prominent figures.

Academic.name: Linguistics
Academic.desc: Limited knowledge of many modern languages; decipher small texts.

Academic.name: Planes
Academic.desc: Knowledge of planar cosmology and specific planes of existence.

Academic.name: Religion
Academic.desc: Knowledge of deities and religions, both new and old.

Academic.name: Sciences
Academic.desc: Mathematics, metallurgy, or another science fitting the setting.

Academic.name: Spellcraft
Academic.desc: Discern ongoing spell effects and understand magical rituals.

Nature.name: Mountaineering
Nature.desc: Climb and find trails in mountainous terrain.

Nature.name: Set Snares
Nature.desc: Construct wilderness snares to trap animals and others.

Nature.name: Tracking
Nature.desc: Discern and follow tracks by analyzing underbrush and terrain.

Nature.name: Wilderness Survival
Nature.desc: Survive in the wild — find food, water, avoid hazards, read weather.

Rogue.name: Decipher Script
Rogue.desc: Glean the context of foreign writing.

Rogue.name: Disguise
Rogue.desc: Mask appearance and voice to appear as another person.

Rogue.name: Gathering Information
Rogue.desc: Extract information from people through conversation.

Rogue.name: Open Locks
Rogue.desc: Gracefully open locks with proper tools.

Rogue.name: Perception
Rogue.desc: Search, spot, and listen — heightened awareness.

Rogue.name: Performance
Rogue.desc: Singing, oration, dancing, and all vocal/physical performance.

Rogue.name: Sleight of Hand
Rogue.desc: Pick pockets, plant items, poison drinks without detection.

Rogue.name: Stealth
Rogue.desc: Move silently and hide in shadows.

Rogue.name: Trapworking
Rogue.desc: Locate, disarm, and set mechanical traps.
